label: Stripe Checkout
summary: Hosted Stripe Checkout for one-time and subscription payments. Adds a server route that creates checkout sessions and a client button that redirects to Stripe's hosted page. Webhook handling is intentionally out of scope — add separately when subscriptions need lifecycle events.

envVars.purpose: Server-side Stripe API authentication. Find it in the Stripe dashboard under Developers > API keys. Tagged 'build' because the checkout-session route instantiates the Stripe client at module scope; a missing/placeholder value makes deploy crash on first request.

Client-side Stripe.js initialization. Safe to expose; the secret key is never sent to the browser. Tagged 'warn-only' because the publishable key is in the harmless placeholder set and a missing real value only disables the checkout button gracefully.
